expectations.text: Flags the response payload rename as a Principle I (API v1 contract) violation
expectations.evidence: Line 1: 'renames id→user_id, username→user_name, switches created_at→createdAt, and removes updated_at. Breaking changes to v1 success payload (non-additive, field removal/rename).'

expectations.text: Flags the console.log of session_id or password as a Principle V (secrets) violation
expectations.evidence: Line 5: 'logs raw session cookie; models/user.js:35 logs plaintext password.'

expectations.text: Notes the hardcoded admin@nutri.test bypass in models/user.js as a Principle II concern
expectations.evidence: Line 2: 'inline permission/whitelist logic for admin@nutri.test bypassing authorization.can'

expectations.text: Notes missing integration test coverage as a Principle III concern
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'diff changes a critical API v1 contract and user-creation flow with no accompanying test in tests/integration/**'

expectations.text: Returns final verdict PR-ready: no (or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Line 18: 'PR-ready: no — logs leak password and session cookie...'
